sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n5065" key="a)mboeidh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀμβοειδής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n5065.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">like an</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἄμβων,</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">protuberant,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heliod.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:49:8:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">49.8.7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
